subcodes.first_line: O servants of the All-Merciful! Sanctify your hearts from fancies and vain imaginings, that ye may taste the sweetness of the celestial stream of utterance, which floweth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عباد الرحمن قدسوا قلوبکم عن الظنون و الاوهام لتجدوا لذه سلسبیل البیان انه جری
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @idolatry, @unity; oneness of humanity, @nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
